LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Pilots_Child.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] grows up in the family of a military pilot. [PAWN_nameDef]'s father taught {PAWN_gender ? him : her} many lessons.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_War_Criminal_Chil: [PAWN_nameDef] is born into the family of a fugitive deserter and a war criminal. Soon, [PAWN_nameDef]'s father dies during the chase.
[PAWN_nameDef] is born into the family of a cruel war hero who has seen a lot. From childhood, [PAWN_nameDef] knows how to handle weapons and obey orders.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Living_Shield.des: [PAWN_nameDef] is born into a gang of terrorists organizing anti-government military actions. One day [PAWN_nameDef] becomes a human shield so that {PAWN_gender ? his : her} father can leave.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Child_Trenches.de: [PAWN_nameDef] spent all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} childhood in military trenches, which practically did not budge from their positions. [PAWN_nameDef] was mainly involved in cooking and treating the wounded.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Reporters_Child.d: [PAWN_nameDef] is born into the family of a war reporter who has been on the battlefield for most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Desperate_Soldier: Despite {PAWN_gender ? his : her} young age, [PAWN_nameDef] took an active part in the trench war, which shook {PAWN_gender ? his : her} psyche. One day [PAWN_nameDef] leads a bayonet attack.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Peaceful_Demonstr: [PAWN_nameDef] advocated an early end to the terrible war in which {PAWN_gender ? his : her} world plunged. [PAWN_nameDef] spent a long time in a camp for political prisoners.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Space_Station_Chi: [PAWN_nameDef] was born on a military space station that housed biological weapons.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Army_Nurse.title: Army nurse
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Army_Nurse.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] has served the wounded on the battlefield since childhood.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Young_Engineer.de: [PAWN_nameDef] entered the ranks of the army as an assistant to the staff engineer, from whom {PAWN_gender ? he : she} learned how to repair equipment.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Communications_En: Since childhood, [PAWN_nameDef] loved radio engineering and, at {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own request, entered the reserve of the army of [PAWN_nameDef]'s empire as a signalman.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Military_Veterina: Since childhood, [PAWN_nameDef] loved radio engineering and, at {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own request, entered the reserve of the army of [PAWN_nameDef]'s empire as a signalman.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Assistant_Cartogr: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the family of a staff cartographer. [PAWN_nameDef]'s father taught {PAWN_gender ? him : her} to work with drawings and topographic maps.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Operator.title: Operator
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Operator.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] entered the army as a child as an ordinary soldier of the headquarters. [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for the coordination of bomb attacks on cities and settlements.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Military_Artist.d: [PAWN_nameDef] is inspired by paintings of destruction and becomes a renowned military artist.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Military_Carpente: [PAWN_nameDef] coordinates the construction of dams and repairs of bridges for the passage of the army.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Factory_Worker.de: Since childhood, [PAWN_nameDef] has been working in a military factory, producing ammunition for heavy weapons.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Trench_Scout.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] was engaged in the delivery of classified data and conducted reconnaissance of the area.
[PAWN_nameDef] was engaged in the delivery of mail in an extensive network of trenches and communicated the orders of the command to the officers.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Young_Sniper.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] handles the rifle well and has earned a reputation as an accurate sniper.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Young_Chef.title: Young chef
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Young_Chef.descri: [PAWN_nameDef]'s task was to prepare food for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} many colleagues in the army of the industrial world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Broken_Child.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] could not stand the horrors of the trench war and will never be the same again.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Young_Partisan.de: [PAWN_nameDef] was engaged in subversive activities in the rear after the enemy occupied [PAWN_nameDef]'s city.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Intelligence_Agen: [PAWN_nameDef] was recruited by enemy agents and supplied important information to the invaders.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Erudite.title: Erudite
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Erudite.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] is very well-read since childhood and loves to spend time in the library.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Restless_Child.de: [PAWN_nameDef] has earned a reputation for being hyperactive and restless.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Barman.title: Barman
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Barman.descriptio: As a child, [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a barman in a small cafe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Animal_Lover.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] adores all living things besides humans, often preferring animals to humans.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Child_Of_Plants.d: [PAWN_nameDef] sits for a long time in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} greenhouse, observing numerous plants and insects.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_King_Of_Drama.des: [PAWN_nameDef] loves to be in the spotlight. This often leads to emotional conversations.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Monastery_Child.d: [PAWN_nameDef] spent all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} childhood in a mountain monastery with serious discipline.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Child_Thinker.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the family of a famous thinker, having spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} childhood reading and studying books.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Philosopher_Child: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the family of a wise philosopher who taught {PAWN_gender ? him : her} the artistic language of speech.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Worker_Child.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a poor family of a simple worker. [PAWN_nameDef] witnessed the anarchist revolution led by {PAWN_gender ? his : her} father.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Cleaner.title: Cleaner
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Cleaner.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] has been working as a janitor for almost all of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} childhood. There is only enough money for the essentials.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Young_Gladiator.d: From an early age, [PAWN_nameDef] fights in the stadium against people like {PAWN_gender ? him : her}, as well as animals. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} life depends only on {PAWN_gender ? his : her} skills.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Model.title: Model
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Model.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works as a model because of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} looks.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Terrorist_Child.d: In {PAWN_gender ? his : her} early years, [PAWN_nameDef] witnessed many terrorist attacks and joined the paramilitary group of criminals.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Young_Guardsman.d: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into a family of hereditary military servants of the royal dynasty.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Resistance_Symbol: During a difficult war, when {PAWN_gender ? his : her} faction is almost broken, [PAWN_nameDef] inspires people to fight, leading the attack.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Artists_Child.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was the only son in the family of a poor artist. As a child, [PAWN_nameDef] showed {PAWN_gender ? his : her} talent by allowing the family to get rich.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Quiet_Child.title: Quiet child
Child
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Quiet_Child.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] was a quiet child. Even too quiet.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Captains_Child.de: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the family of a ship captain, having spent most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} childhood at sea.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Admirals_Child.de: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the family of an admiral of the navy and gained a lot of knowledge by communicating with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} father.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Topographer.title: Topographer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Topographer.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] disliked violence, so [PAWN_nameDef] preferred cartography to military service.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Pirates_Child.des: [PAWN_nameDef] is born on a pirate warship, which is part of a large pirate fleet. From childhood, [PAWN_nameDef] knows how to handle weapons and cannons.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Rebel_Soldier.des: [PAWN_nameDef] is called up early for military service, but {PAWN_gender ? he : she} revolts and goes to prison.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Traitor.title: Traitor
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Traitor.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] betrayed {PAWN_gender ? his : her} commander by surrendering to the enemy army. Enemies take possession of important information, and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} faction is defeated.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Prisoner.title: Prisoner
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Prisoner.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] is imprisoned by mistake, which destroys {PAWN_gender ? his : her} personality forever.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Hostage.title: Hostage
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Hostage.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] was captured while walking through the city, demanding an impressive ransom. [PAWN_nameDef] was able to escape from captivity only after a few years.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Childhood_Remote_Identity.d: [PAWN_nameDef] doesn't remember anything about {PAWN_gender ? his : her} past. In fact, only a shell remained of {PAWN_gender ? him : her}.
